title: Add project dropdown in topbar with navigation and session management

requirements.text: Add a project dropdown component in the black marked area of the topbar (between the 'Dashboard' title and the 'U' user icon in the top right) that displays the name of the currently selected project

quotes: Projekt-Dropdown im markierten schwarzen Bereich (oben rechts in der Topbar, zwischen dem 'Dashboard' Titel und dem 'U' User-Icon)

acceptanceCriteria: Dropdown is positioned in the topbar between the page title and user icon
Current project name is displayed in the dropdown trigger
Dropdown has appropriate styling consistent with the existing topbar design

requirements.text: When the project dropdown is clicked, display a list of all available projects for the current user plus a 'Neues Projekt erstellen' (Create New Project) option at the bottom

quotes: Beim Klick öffnet sich ein Dropdown mit allen verfügbaren Projekten + 'Neues Projekt erstellen' Option

acceptanceCriteria: All projects accessible to the user are listed in the dropdown
Each project entry shows the project name
A 'Neues Projekt erstellen' option appears at the bottom of the list
Clicking a project navigates to that project's dashboard
Clicking 'Neues Projekt erstellen' navigates to the Roadmap page to create a new project

requirements.text: After login or logout, navigate the user to the WelcomeScreen with three options: 'Neues Projekt erstellen' (Create New Project), 'Zu bestehendem Projekt zurückkehren' (Return to Existing Project), and 'Bestehendes Projekt joinen' (Join Existing Project)

quotes: Nach Login/Logout → 'Willkommen im Umbau Manager' Startbildschirm mit den 3 Optionen (Neues Projekt erstellen, Zu bestehendem Projekt zurückkehren, Bestehendes Projekt joinen)

acceptanceCriteria: After successful Internet Identity login, user is redirected to WelcomeScreen
After logout, user is redirected to WelcomeScreen
WelcomeScreen displays three clearly labeled options for project actions
Each option navigates to the appropriate destination when clicked

requirements.text: When accessing the app directly via URL (not through login), automatically load the last used project from LocalStorage and navigate to that project's dashboard

quotes: Bei direktem URL-Aufruf → Das zuletzt verwendete Projekt wird automatisch geladen

acceptanceCriteria: On app initialization, check LocalStorage for last used project ID
If a valid last used project ID exists and user is authenticated, navigate to that project's dashboard
If no last used project exists or user is not authenticated, show WelcomeScreen
Auto-navigation only happens on direct URL access, not after login/logout

requirements.text: Implement session management that stores the currently selected project ID in LocalStorage whenever a user switches projects or selects a project

quotes: LocalStorage speichert das zuletzt verwendete Projekt

acceptanceCriteria: When user selects a project from the dropdown, save that project ID to LocalStorage
When user creates a new project and navigates to it, save that project ID to LocalStorage
When user joins a project via invite, save that project ID to LocalStorage
LocalStorage key is consistent and namespaced appropriately

requirements.text: Ensure proper project access control and permission checking when loading projects from LocalStorage or switching projects via the dropdown
acceptanceCriteria: Before loading a project from LocalStorage, verify the user has access to that project
If user does not have access to the stored project, redirect to WelcomeScreen
Project dropdown only shows projects the current user is a member of
Proper error handling if project access fails

constraints: Maintain existing Internet Identity authentication flow
Do not modify the user icon ('U') or logout functionality in the topbar
Preserve existing routing structure for all pages
Keep the existing sidebar navigation intact
Do not change the project data model in the backend
nonGoals: Changing the project creation or editing forms
Altering the appearance of the user profile menu
Implementing project deletion from the dropdown
Adding project search or filtering in the dropdown
